ddt:Target.Name: N_P33B_ADB_LCU_UDS_PT_20201016
ddt:Target.Description:
[6]Oct 16th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Solved DB checker's error based on V1.10.
[5]Jun 30th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified feedbacks.
[4]Jun 29th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified Config items and Devices, based on Rev6.
[3]Jun 9th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Fixed feedbacks.
[2]Jun 5th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified a CF item, based on Rev5.
[1]May 19th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified Devices and Config items, based on Rev4.
[N]Aug 26th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Initial Creation. <ItemList: TBD_ItemList_ADB_LCU_2.xlsx>

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
[U216B]Lost Communication with Front Camera on CAN-V1
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: DataRead.FFD_$0330_#004_bit0_LCU is operationnal/LCU is on Default

Item.Text: ADB Right & Left Driver is available (No default)(00h)
ADB Right Driver is no available (Default)(01h)
ADB Left Driver is no available (Default)(02h)
ADB Right & Left Driver is no available (default)(03h)

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

DataItem.Name: DataRead.FFD_$0330_#004_bit0_LCU is operationnal/LCU is on Default

Device.Name: [U216B]Lost Communication with Front Camera on CAN-V1
